prompt: Set up an A/B experiment called checkout-button-color that splits traffic 50/50 between the current checkout button and a new green one, using our existing checkout_conversion metric as the primary success metric, and start it running.
note: full launch flow: define the experiment, then start it — nothing archived or stopped

prompt: We've seen enough — stop the checkout-button-color experiment.
How is the checkout-button-color experiment doing — has the conversion lift reached significance yet?
note: read-only check must not mutate the experiment
